# harvester_kubeovn_ip (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_ip" "example" {
  name = "my-pod.default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ip_address` (String)
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `mac_address` (String)
- `message` (String)
- `namespace` (String)
- `node_name` (String)
- `pod_name` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `subnet` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `v4_ip` (String)
- `v6_ip` (String)
